news.title: Fans Flocked to World Cup Host Cities—Causing 80 Percent of the Tournament’s Emissions
news.summary: The latest estimates reveal that the majority of greenhouse gas emissions from large-scale events such as the FIFA World Cup stem from spectators traveling to host cities.

news.title: Even Mild Sleep Deprivation May Lead to Weight Gain
news.summary: A recent study suggests that not getting enough sleep increases the risk of weight gain, and thus of conditions like heart disease and type 2 diabetes.
